tasks.title: Monorepo scaffolding + root config
tasks.description:
Create the monorepo root structure at /home/sebastian/personal-ai/frontend/.

Files to create:
1. `pnpm-workspace.yaml` — define workspaces: ['apps/*', 'packages/*']
2. `package.json` — root package with:
   - name: '@gilbertus/monorepo', private: true
   - scripts: { 'dev': 'pnpm --filter web dev', 'build': 'pnpm --filter web build', 'lint': 'eslint .', 'generate:api': 'pnpm --filter api-client generate' }
   - devDependencies: typescript@~5.7, eslint, @typescript-eslint/parser, @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin, prettier
3. `tsconfig.base.json` — shared config: target ES2022, module ESNext, moduleResolution bundler, strict: true, jsx: react-jsx, paths: { '@gilbertus/ui': ['packages/ui/src'], '@gilbertus/api-client': ['packages/api-client/src'], '@gilbertus/rbac': ['packages/rbac/src'], '@gilbertus/i18n': ['packages/i18n/src'] }
4. `.eslintrc.js` — extends @typescript-eslint/recommended, rules: no-console warn
5. `.gitignore` — node_modules, .next, dist, .env.local, .turbo, target/
6. `.env.example` — template with GILBERTUS_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000, GILBERTUS_API_KEY=, NEXTAUTH_SECRET=, NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000, AZURE_AD_CLIENT_ID=, AZURE_AD_CLIENT_SECRET=, AZURE_AD_TENANT_ID=, OMNIUS_API_URL=

After creating files: run `cd frontend && pnpm install` to verify zero errors.
This task creates ONLY root-level files. All subdirectories are created by subsequent tasks.

tasks.title: RBAC package (@gilbertus/rbac)
tasks.description:
Create the RBAC package at frontend/packages/rbac/. This mirrors the Python backend permissions system.

Files:
1. `package.json` — name: '@gilbertus/rbac', main: 'src/index.ts', peerDependencies: { react: '>=19' }
2. `tsconfig.json` — extends ../../tsconfig.base.json, include: ['src']
3. `src/roles.ts` — Export RoleName type and ROLES constant:
   ```typescript
   export type RoleName = 'gilbertus_admin' | 'operator' | 'ceo' | 'board' | 'director' | 'manager' | 'specialist';
   export const ROLES: Record<RoleName, { level: number; label: string }> = {
     gilbertus_admin: { level: 99, label: 'System Admin' },
     operator: { level: 70, label: 'Operator' },
     ceo: { level: 60, label: 'CEO' },
     board: { level: 50, label: 'Board' },
     director: { level: 40, label: 'Director' },
     manager: { level: 30, label: 'Manager' },
     specialist: { level: 20, label: 'Specialist' },
   };
   ```
4. `src/permissions.ts` — Export ROLE_PERMISSIONS mapping (mirrors omnius/db/migrations/003_seed.sql):
   - operator: ['config:write:system', 'sync:manage', 'sync:credentials', 'infra:manage', 'dev:execute', 'commands:task']
   - ceo: ['data:read:all', 'financials:read', 'evaluations:read:all', 'communications:read:all', 'config:write:system', 'users:manage:all', 'queries:create', 'prompts:manage', 'rbac:manage', 'commands:email', 'commands:ticket', 'commands:meeting', 'commands:task', 'commands:sync', 'views:configure:own']
   - board: ['data:read:all', 'financials:read', 'evaluations:read:reports', 'config:write:system', 'users:manage:below', 'queries:create', 'commands:email', 'commands:ticket', 'commands:meeting', 'commands:task', 'commands:sync', 'views:configure:own']
   - director: ['data:read:department', 'evaluations:read:reports', 'communications:read:department', 'config:write:department', 'queries:create', 'commands:email', 'commands:ticket', 'commands:meeting', 'commands:task', 'commands:sync', 'views:configure:own']
   - manager: ['data:read:team', 'config:write:own', 'queries:create:department', 'commands:ticket', 'commands:meeting', 'commands:task', 'views:configure:own']
   - specialist: ['data:read:own', 'config:write:own', 'commands:task', 'views:configure:own']
   - gilbertus_admin: [] (bypasses all checks via level 99)
   Export `hasPermission(role, roleLevel, permission)` — if roleLevel >= 99 return true, else check ROLE_PERMISSIONS.
5. `src/classifications.ts` — Export ROLE_CLASSIFICATIONS:
   - gilbertus_admin/ceo: ['public', 'internal', 'confidential', 'ceo_only', 'personal']
   - board: ['public', 'internal', 'confidential', 'personal']
   - director/manager: ['public', 'internal', 'personal']
   - specialist: ['public', 'personal']
   - operator: []
   Export `allowedClassifications(role)`.
6. `src/navigation.ts` — Export MODULES config and `getNavigationModules(role)` function:
   ```typescript
   export interface ModuleConfig {
     id: string;
     icon: string;  // lucide-react icon name
     roles: RoleName[] | ['*'];
     label: { pl: string; en: string };
     path: string;
   }
   ```
   Modules: dashboard('*'), chat('*'), people(ceo/board/director), intelligence(ceo/board), compliance(ceo/board/director), market(ceo/board/director), finance(ceo/board), process(ceo/board/director), decisions(ceo), calendar(ceo/board/director/manager), documents(ceo/board/director), voice(ceo/board), settings('*'), omnius(gilbertus_admin).
   `getNavigationModules(role)` filters modules where role matches or roles=['*']. Admin (gilbertus_admin) sees everything.
7. `src/hooks.ts` — React hooks (use 'use client' directive):
   - `useRole()` — reads role from NextAuth session, returns { role, roleLevel }
   - `usePermissions()` — returns { hasPermission(perm), permissions[] }
   - `useClassifications()` — returns allowed classification levels
   These hooks use `useSession()` from next-auth/react internally.
8. `src/index.ts` — re-export everything from roles, permissions, classifications, navigation, hooks.

tasks.title: i18n package (@gilbertus/i18n)
tasks.description:
Create the i18n package at frontend/packages/i18n/. Uses next-intl for App Router.

Files:
1. `package.json` — name: '@gilbertus/i18n', main: 'src/index.ts', dependencies: { 'next-intl': '^4' }
2. `tsconfig.json` — extends ../../tsconfig.base.json
3. `src/index.ts` — export config: { defaultLocale: 'pl', locales: ['pl', 'en'] }, re-export request config
4. `src/request.ts` — next-intl server request config: getRequestConfig that loads messages from messages/[locale].json
5. `messages/pl.json` — Polish translations for P0:
   ```json
   {
     "common": {
       "appName": "Gilbertus Albans",
       "loading": "Ładowanie...",
       "error": "Wystąpił błąd",
       "save": "Zapisz",
       "cancel": "Anuluj",
       "search": "Szukaj...",
       "noResults": "Brak wyników"
     },
     "auth": {
       "login": "Zaloguj się",
       "logout": "Wyloguj",
       "apiKeyLabel": "Klucz API",
       "apiKeyPlaceholder": "Wpisz klucz API...",
       "azureAdButton": "Zaloguj przez Microsoft",
       "invalidKey": "Nieprawidłowy klucz API",
       "loginTitle": "Gilbertus Albans",
       "loginSubtitle": "Zaloguj się do systemu"
     },
     "nav": {
       "dashboard": "Panel główny",
       "chat": "Czat",
       "people": "Ludzie",
       "intelligence": "Inteligencja",
       "compliance": "Compliance",
       "market": "Rynek",
       "finance": "Finanse",
       "process": "Procesy",
       "decisions": "Decyzje",
       "calendar": "Kalendarz",
       "documents": "Dokumenty",
       "voice": "Głos",
       "settings": "Ustawienia",
       "omnius": "Omnius"
     },
     "sidebar": {
       "collapse": "Zwiń",
       "expand": "Rozwiń"
     },
     "commandPalette": {
       "placeholder": "Wpisz komendę lub szukaj...",
       "noResults": "Brak wyników",
       "navigation": "Nawigacja",
       "actions": "Akcje"
     },
     "theme": {
       "light": "Jasny",
       "dark": "Ciemny",
       "system": "Systemowy"
     }
   }
   ```
6. `messages/en.json` — English translations (same structure, English values):
   common.appName='Gilbertus Albans', auth.login='Sign in', nav.dashboard='Dashboard', nav.chat='Chat', nav.people='People', nav.intelligence='Intelligence', etc.

tasks.title: API client package (@gilbertus/api-client)
Next.js app scaffolding + config
tasks.description:
Create the Next.js 15 app at frontend/apps/web/. This task covers ONLY config and root layout — NOT auth or shell components.

Files:
1. `package.json` — name: '@gilbertus/web', private: true, scripts: { dev: 'next dev', build: 'next build', start: 'next start', lint: 'next lint' }, dependencies: { next: '^15', react: '^19', react-dom: '^19', next-auth: '5.0.0-beta.25', next-intl: '^4', zustand: '^5', next-themes: '^0.4', lucide-react: '^0.460', clsx: '^2', tailwind-merge: '^2', '@tanstack/react-query': '^5', '@gilbertus/ui': 'workspace:*', '@gilbertus/api-client': 'workspace:*', '@gilbertus/rbac': 'workspace:*', '@gilbertus/i18n': 'workspace:*' }, devDependencies: { typescript: '~5.7', '@types/react': '^19', '@types/node': '^22', tailwindcss: '^4', postcss: '^8', autoprefixer: '^10' }
2. `tsconfig.json` — extends ../../tsconfig.base.json, paths for @/ → ./
3. `next.config.ts` — transpilePackages: ['@gilbertus/ui', '@gilbertus/rbac', '@gilbertus/api-client', '@gilbertus/i18n'], env: { NEXT_PUBLIC_GILBERTUS_API_URL: process.env.GILBERTUS_API_URL || 'http://127.0.0.1:8000' }
4. `tailwind.config.ts` — content paths include packages/ui, extend theme with CSS variable colors (bg, surface, accent, etc.), fontFamily Inter, borderRadius from --radius
5. `postcss.config.js` — standard: tailwindcss + autoprefixer
6. `.env.local.example` — NEXTAUTH_SECRET=change-me, NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000, GILBERTUS_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000, GILBERTUS_API_KEY=, AZURE_AD_CLIENT_ID=, AZURE_AD_CLIENT_SECRET=, AZURE_AD_TENANT_ID=, OMNIUS_API_URL=
7. `app/globals.css` — Tailwind directives (@tailwind base/components/utilities) + CSS custom properties for dark/light themes as specified in plan (--bg: #0f1117, --surface: #1a1d27, etc.). Import Inter font from Google Fonts or next/font.
8. `app/layout.tsx` — Root layout: html lang='pl' with suppressHydrationWarning, body with Inter font class + bg-[var(--bg)] text-[var(--text)]. Wrap children in Providers component.
9. `components/providers.tsx` — Compose all providers: SessionProvider (next-auth), QueryClientProvider (@tanstack/react-query), ThemeProvider (next-themes, defaultTheme='dark'), NextIntlClientProvider. Create QueryClient with staleTime: 60_000.

Do NOT create auth config, middleware, sidebar, or any page components — those are separate tasks.

tasks.title: UI package + shadcn base components
tasks.description:
Create the shared UI package at frontend/packages/ui/. Includes theme provider and base utility components.

Files:
1. `package.json` — name: '@gilbertus/ui', main: 'src/index.ts', peerDependencies: { react: '>=19', react-dom: '>=19', lucide-react: '>=0.460', next-themes: '>=0.4' }, dependencies: { '@radix-ui/react-dialog': '^1', '@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu': '^2', '@radix-ui/react-tooltip': '^1', '@radix-ui/react-avatar': '^1', '@radix-ui/react-separator': '^1', 'cmdk': '^1', 'class-variance-authority': '^0.7', 'clsx': '^2', 'tailwind-merge': '^2' }
2. `tsconfig.json` — extends ../../tsconfig.base.json
3. `src/lib/utils.ts` — Export `cn(...inputs)` function using clsx + tailwind-merge (standard shadcn pattern)
4. `src/components/theme-provider.tsx` — Thin wrapper around next-themes ThemeProvider. 'use client'. Props: children, defaultTheme='dark', attribute='class'.
5. `src/components/theme-toggle.tsx` — 'use client'. Button that cycles dark→light→system. Uses useTheme() from next-themes. Icon: Sun/Moon from lucide-react.
6. `src/components/skeleton-card.tsx` — Reusable skeleton loading card. Animated pulse div with configurable height/width. Used as placeholder in all module pages.
7. `src/components/rbac-gate.tsx` — 'use client'. Props: { permission?: string; roles?: RoleName[]; children; fallback?: ReactNode }. Uses usePermissions() and useRole() from @gilbertus/rbac. Renders children only if user has required permission or role. Renders fallback (default: null) otherwise.
8. `src/index.ts` — re-export all components and utils.

Do NOT create sidebar, topbar, command-palette, user-menu, or login-form — those are in separate tasks.

tasks.title: Tauri desktop placeholder
NextAuth config + login page + auth middleware
tasks.description:
Create the authentication system. Depends on P0T4 (api-client) and P0T5 (Next.js app) being complete.

Files:
1. `apps/web/lib/auth.ts` — NextAuth v5 configuration:
   - Import NextAuth from 'next-auth'
   - CredentialsProvider: id='api-key', name='API Key', credentials: { apiKey: { label: 'API Key', type: 'password' } }
     - authorize(credentials): call `fetch(GILBERTUS_API_URL + '/health', { headers: { 'X-API-Key': credentials.apiKey } })`. If 200 → return { id: 'gilbertus-admin', email: 'sebastian@gilbertus.local', name: 'Sebastian', role: 'gilbertus_admin', roleLevel: 99, permissions: [], tenant: 'gilbertus', authType: 'api_key' }. If fail → return null.
   - AzureADProvider (Microsoft Entra ID): clientId, clientSecret, tenantId from env. (Configure but mark as TODO for full Omnius user lookup — for now just map Azure AD profile to basic session).
   - Callbacks:
     - jwt({ token, user }): if user, merge role/roleLevel/permissions/tenant/authType into token
     - session({ session, token }): populate session.user with role/roleLevel/permissions/tenant/authType from token
   - Pages: { signIn: '/login' }
   - Export { handlers: { GET, POST }, auth, signIn, signOut }

2. `apps/web/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts` — Export { GET, POST } from lib/auth handlers.

3. `apps/web/middleware.ts` — NextAuth middleware:
   - Public paths: /login, /api/auth, /_next, /favicon.ico
   - For all other paths: check auth session. If no session → redirect to /login.
   - Use NextAuth's `auth` as middleware wrapper.

4. `apps/web/app/(auth)/layout.tsx` — Auth layout: centered container, dark background, flex items-center justify-center min-h-screen.

5. `apps/web/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx` — Login page:
   - 'use client'
   - Card with Gilbertus logo/title, subtitle 'Zaloguj się do systemu'
   - API key input field (password type) + 'Zaloguj' submit button
   - Divider with 'lub'
   - 'Zaloguj przez Microsoft' button (Azure AD)
   - On API key submit: call signIn('api-key', { apiKey, redirect: false }). If error → show 'Nieprawidłowy klucz API'. If ok → router.push('/dashboard').
   - On Azure AD click: call signIn('azure-ad').
   - Use translations from @gilbertus/i18n for all labels.
   - Styled with Tailwind: surface card, accent buttons, proper spacing.

6. `apps/web/lib/stores/sidebar-store.ts` — Zustand store:
   ```typescript
   interface SidebarStore { collapsed: boolean; toggle: () => void; setCollapsed: (v: boolean) => void }
   ```
   Use zustand/middleware persist to localStorage key 'gilbertus-sidebar'.

7. `apps/web/lib/stores/command-palette-store.ts` — Zustand store:
   ```typescript
   interface CommandPaletteStore { open: boolean; query: string; setOpen: (v: boolean) => void; setQuery: (q: string) => void }
   ```

tasks.title: App shell: sidebar, topbar, command palette, app layout
tasks.description:
Create the authenticated app shell with sidebar navigation, topbar, and command palette. Depends on P0T2 (rbac), P0T5 (Next.js app), P0T6 (UI package), P0T8 (auth + stores).

Files:
1. `packages/ui/src/components/sidebar.tsx` — 'use client'. Full sidebar component:
   - Props: none (reads from stores and session internally)
   - Uses useSidebarStore() for collapsed state
   - Uses useSession() from next-auth to get user role
   - Uses getNavigationModules(role) from @gilbertus/rbac to get filtered modules
   - Uses usePathname() from next/navigation for active state
   - Width: 260px expanded, 64px collapsed (CSS transition)
   - Structure: Logo at top → nav items (icon + label, icon only when collapsed) → footer with UserMenu
   - Each nav item: lucide-react icon, label from translations, link to /(app)/[module]
   - Active state: accent background color
   - Collapse toggle button at bottom of nav
   - Responsive: on mobile (<768px) overlay with backdrop

2. `packages/ui/src/components/topbar.tsx` — 'use client'. Top navigation bar:
   - Height: 56px, sticky top-0
   - Left: breadcrumb showing current module name
   - Right: Cmd+K trigger button (shows 'Ctrl+K' hint), ThemeToggle, notification bell (placeholder icon, badge for P2)
   - Background: var(--surface), border-bottom: var(--border)

3. `packages/ui/src/components/command-palette.tsx` — 'use client'. Cmd+K command palette:
   - Uses cmdk library (Command component)
   - Uses useCommandPaletteStore() for open/close state
   - Global keyboard listener: Cmd+K / Ctrl+K → toggle open
   - Escape → close
   - Lists navigation modules (filtered by RBAC) in 'Nawigacja' group
   - Lists quick actions in 'Akcje' group: 'Wyloguj', 'Zmień motyw'
   - On select navigation → router.push, close palette
   - Overlay with backdrop blur

4. `packages/ui/src/components/user-menu.tsx` — 'use client'. User dropdown in sidebar footer:
   - Shows avatar (initials), display name, role badge
   - Dropdown (Radix DropdownMenu): 'Ustawienia', 'Wyloguj'
   - On logout: call signOut() from next-auth

5. `apps/web/app/(app)/layout.tsx` — App layout (authenticated shell):
   - Flex row: Sidebar + main content area
   - Main area: Topbar (sticky) + scrollable content area with padding
   - CommandPalette rendered here (global overlay)
   - Uses auth() server-side to verify session (redirect to /login if not authenticated)

6. `apps/web/app/(app)/page.tsx` — Root app page: redirect to /dashboard using next/navigation redirect().

7. `apps/web/app/(app)/dashboard/page.tsx` — Placeholder dashboard:
   - Title: 'Panel główny' (from translations)
   - Grid of SkeletonCards as placeholder
   - Message: 'Dashboard will be implemented in P2'

Update `packages/ui/src/index.ts` to export new components (sidebar, topbar, command-palette, user-menu).
